summary: UI/UX Fixes Backend Testing Complete - All 25/25 tests passed. Verified dashboard stats (active_clients, upcoming_appointments, contracts_pending_signature, pending_invoices), client filter (Active/Inactive/Leads), provider notes/contracts/invoices creation with client_id, and timeline showing created items.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats verified: active_clients, upcoming_appointments, contracts_pending_signature, pending_invoices all present
Midwife dashboard has role-specific stats: visits_this_month, births_this_month, prenatal_clients
Client filter works: include_inactive=false filters to active only, status_filter=Lead filters leads
Provider notes creation works with client_id requirement (400 if missing)
Provider contracts creation works with client_id (also requires client_name, estimated_due_date, retainer_amount)
Provider invoices creation works with client_id
Timeline query for contracts checks doula_id/midwife_id in addition to provider_id
Created notes appear in client timeline immediately
Created contracts appear in client timeline immediately
Created invoices appear in client timeline immediately
Client detail has _counts object with appointments, notes, contracts, invoices counts
No MongoDB _id in responses (dashboard, clients, timeline)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_UI112_ prefixed notes, contracts, and invoices during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX fixes backend verification complete. Key verified endpoints: GET /api/provider/dashboard (has active_clients, upcoming_appointments, contracts_pending_signature, pending_invoices), GET /api/provider/clients (with include_inactive and status_filter params), POST /api/provider/notes (requires client_id), POST /api/doula/contracts (requires client_id, client_name, estimated_due_date, retainer_amount), POST /api/doula/invoices (requires client_id), GET /api/provider/clients/{id}/timeline (returns notes, contracts, invoices with correct doula_id/midwife_id query).

details: Midwife dashboard returns visits_this_month, births_this_month, prenatal_clients
Default client list returns active clients only (is_active != false)
status_filter=Lead returns only Lead status clients
Create note with valid client_id succeeds
Create contract with client_id, client_name, estimated_due_date, retainer_amount succeeds
Created note appears in client timeline
Created contract appears in client timeline
Created invoice appears in client timeline
Client detail returns _counts with appointments, notes, contracts, invoices

mocked_apis.note: All tested routes use real database queries. UI/UX fixes verified with live MongoDB.
